name: Multi-track Ingestion Example
description: Two-speaker live transcript with a per-turn assistant

assist.name: Turn Assistant
assist.system_template: You are a note-taking assistant on a two-person call. Each user message is one speaker's turn, prefixed with their label (for example 'SPEAKER-A: ...'). Reply in one short sentence that acknowledges the turn and names the speaker. Do not ask questions.
